zh.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Guînes於1200年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯i斯。她於1220年與Anseau de Crésecques在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫奧德納爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1245年在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guînes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Irish Guinness, a shortened form of McGinnis . This surname is found predominantly in TX.

variants.name: McGinnis
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Aonghuis or Mag Aonghusa ‘son of Aonghus’ (see Angus ). This is the surname of a chieftain family in western County Down. Compare the Scottish form McInnis , and the variant McNeese . Compare also McGuinness .

nameMeanings.name: Béatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Guînes was born in 1200, in Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. She married Anseau de Crésecques in 1220, in Oudenaarde, East Flanders, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1245, in Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Guînes est née en 1200, à Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Elle a épousé Anseau de Crésecques en 1220, à Audenarde, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1245, à Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Guînes wurde 1200 in Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren. Sie hat 1220 in Oudenaarde, Ostflandern, Belgien Anseau de Crésecques geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1245 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Guînes è nata il nel 1200 nel Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Lei sposato Anseau de Crésecques nel 1220, nel Oudenaarde, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1245, nel Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Guînesは1200年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスグiンスで生まれた。1220年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンオウデナアルドでAnseau de Crésecquesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1245年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Guînes(은)는 1200년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이 구i네스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1220년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 우데나아르드에서 Anseau de Crésecques(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1245년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Guînes nasceu em 1200, em Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Ela casou-se com Anseau de Crésecques em 1220, em Oudenaarde, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1245, em Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Guînes родилась в 1200 г. в местности гуiнесь, калеи, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anseau de Crésecques в 1220 г. в местности оуденаард, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1245 г. в местности сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Guînes nació en 1200, en Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Se casó con Anseau de Crésecques en 1220, en Oudenaarde, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1245, en Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 45 años.
